title: championella dalzielii
intro: Championella dalzielii, also known as African Championella, is a plant species native to West Africa that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Championella dalzielii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea that is consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
